arguments.argument:
event_inherited() makeActive() setCollisionBounds(-8,-37,8,-1) image_speed=0.15
//Enemy base statistics eName="Ghoul" eLevel=11 maxLife=150 life=maxLife pointWorth=10 atkPower=4 resType[1]=2 resType[2]=4 resType[5]=4 stunResist=2 baseItemChance=50 baseDropIndex=85 affiliation=3 dieEffect=0 initDir=0 runAcc=2.25
deathAnim=0
jeremyText="Easy stuff here. Just goes in a straight line." chaoText="You know it won't stay this easy. It never does." devText="I wasn't sure if I wanted to use these 8-bit tiles for the first areas of Gate 3. Not that clashing sprites has ever been a bother to me when making this series, but these in particular always looked extra odd."
